rationale: Review 2 correctly identifies that four general bialgebra/Hopf lemmas (antipode_comp, map_antipode, map_id, map_comp) are unnecessarily private, blocking reuse within TauCeti — directly verifiable from the diff's `private` keywords and decisive for the reuse rubric. It also flags a genuine rfl-redundancy in includeRight_apply. Review 1 finds nothing and misses all of these reuse concerns.
